seo.title: Enterprise Development and Consulting for Chinese Markets | SSW
seo.description: Unlock the Chinese market. SSW’s Chinafy experts optimize your web apps for speed, reliability, and local compliance behind the Great Firewall.

topLabel.labelText: 20+ years delivering Western solutions to Eastern markets

blocks.heading: China's digital market is massive. Most Western businesses approach it **completely wrong.**
blocks.description: China has 1.4 billion WeChat users, 945 million Mini Program users, and a payments ecosystem that processes transactions nearly 3 times per day per person. It's not catching up to the West, in many ways it's already ahead. SSW has a team in Hangzhou and two decades of experience helping Western businesses enter this market the right way.

blocks.heading: Trusted in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, and Newcastle by
Why most teams get this wrong.
blocks.description: Most Western teams jump straight to VPNs, CDNs, and network routing. But the first blocker is legal data residency requirements, ICP filings, and cross-border transfer rules that reshape architecture decisions you thought were already made. The second is your dependencies, Google OAuth, Stripe, OpenAI, Facebook login. All broken the moment someone in Shanghai opens your app. SSW helps audit both before anything else.

features.heading: Compliance before code
features.description: Data residency rules and ICP filing requirements affect architectural decisions most teams have already locked in. We identify the implications early, before they become expensive to undo.

features.heading: Dependency audit
features.description: Most modern apps quietly rely on services that are blocked in China. We map every external dependency, auth, payments, analytics, AI providers, and identify what needs replacing and with what.

buttons.buttonText: 🔨 Do You Know Why You Should Chinafy Your App?

cards.heading: Application Localisation
cards.description: Getting into China goes far beyond translation. SSW guides you through the full localisation and optimisation process, aligning your UX with Chinese user expectations, improving adoption rates, and making sure your application actually competes in the market.

cards.heading: China Social Media & Mini Programs
cards.description: Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, and Twitter are inaccessible in China. WeChat is the platform, and WeChat Mini Programs are how 945 million people access apps without a download. SSW helps you identify the right platforms for your industry and build a presence where your Chinese customers actually are.

cards.heading: Integration with Local Services
cards.description: Blocked CDNs, missing payment rails, inaccessible APIs. SSW replaces your Western dependencies with proven local equivalents, Azure China (operated by 21Vianet), Alibaba Cloud, WeChat Pay, and Alipay, so your application performs reliably for Chinese users.

I'm grateful for their unwavering commitment to excellence and delighted to have them in our office. Thank you, SSW!"

blocks.heading: Why SSW?
blocks.description: SSW has delivered enterprise Microsoft solutions for more than 1,000 clients across 15 countries. With 100 consultants across 4 countries, including a team based in Hangzhou, SSW's developers are some of the best in the business. Many Microsoft Certifications, several MVPs, and a Microsoft Regional Director.

accordionItems.label: Do I need a Chinese business entity to operate on WeChat?
accordionItems.content: No. Overseas entities can directly register and authenticate. However, a domestic Chinese entity is required if your Mini Program's server is hosted in mainland China (due to ICP filing regulations). Additionally, overseas entities face more restrictions regarding the types of services they can offer.

accordionItems.label: Which Chinese platforms actually matter for my industry?
accordionItems.content: WeChat is the baseline, communication, payments, and app distribution in one. Beyond that it depends on your model. SSW helps you identify which platforms actually move the needle for your specific business rather than trying to be everywhere at once.

accordionItems.label: How long does it take to launch a Mini Program?
accordionItems.content: The total timeline runs from 4 to 8 weeks, though this can compress to roughly one week if development is already complete and ICP filing isn't required. The total timeline runs from 4 to 8 weeks, though this can compress to roughly one week if development is already complete and ICP filing isn't required.

accordionItems.label: What Western services and tools are blocked in China?
accordionItems.content: More than most teams expect. Google OAuth, Firebase, Google Analytics, Stripe, OpenAI, Facebook login, and many Western CDNs are all unavailable or unreliable. Replacements exist for almost all of them but identifying what needs replacing and implementing it correctly takes experience.

blocks.heading: Talk to us about moving your project to China
blocks.description: Connect with our Account Managers to discuss how we can help.
